assertions.title: Output transformation note bar is visible

steps.action: Load preview screen with processed fixture PDF
steps.expected: Note bar is visible between toolbar and viewport with output-transformation explanation
steps.observed: Note bar rendered with text 'The downloaded file has permanent black bars — nothing recoverable.'
DOM metrics showed docBarBottom=42, noteTop=42, noteBottom=74, viewportTop=74 (betweenToolbarAndViewport=true)

assertions.title: Jump button navigates to first unresolved entity

steps.action: With unresolved entities present, capture pre-jump state
steps.observed: Before jump: page='Page 1 of 3', jumpVisible=true, uncertainChip='1'

steps.expected: Viewport navigates to first unresolved entity and focuses it; sidebar row selected
steps.observed: After jump: page='Page 3 of 3', focusedDecision='UNCERTAIN', focusedUncertain=true, activeRows include 'Employer EIN'

steps.expected: Jump button hidden when unresolved count reaches zero

assertions.title: Page thumbnails show amber dots for unresolved pages

steps.action: Inspect thumbnail indicators with unresolved entities on pages 1 and 3
steps.expected: Amber dots on page 1 and page 3 only
Page 1 dot disappears while page 3 dot remains
steps.observed: After resolve: page1=false, page2=false, page3=true; uncertainChip reduced from '2' to '1'

assertions.title: Tooltip action button toggles entity decision

steps.expected: Tooltip shows action button to keep entity
steps.observed: Tooltip action text was 'Keep instead' for focused REDACT entity-1

steps.expected: Entity toggles REDACT -> KEEP, highlight turns green, counts update
steps.observed: Entity-1 decision became KEEP, greenCount=1, chips changed removing 2->1 and keeping 0->1

frictions.description: Drop-screen file input is hidden, so direct upload automation is not interactable by default.
frictions.resolution: Used in-session DOM style override to expose input[type=file], then uploaded fixture via agent-browser upload.

frictions.description: A stale element ref click attempt timed out on the sidebar entity row during tooltip setup.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted and used semantic locator click ('find text') to focus the row before hover interaction.
